summary: v1.3 verification: 20/20 router unit tests green; full backend suite 68/68 green. Frontend regression checks: SW registers on HTTPS non-native, InstallPromptProvider still captures synthetic beforeinstallprompt on 390 viewport (non-native), /privacy returns 200, AppFooter renders on non-home route. Capacitor scaffolding (android/, ios/, capacitor.config.json, @capacitor/* deps v7) all present. MOTS confetti component verified via code inspection (data-testid='mots-confetti', pointer-events-none, mounted at stage>=3, uses key by threshold).
action_items: Optional: capacitor.config.json is not copied into /app/frontend/android/ or /app/frontend/ios/. In Capacitor 7 this is normally created by `npx cap sync` after a build; the root config exists and is authoritative. If the review requirement literally means the file must be present inside android/ and ios/, run `npx cap sync` on a machine with a build output. Non-blocking in this container.
Nit: server.py still uses deprecated @app.on_event(startup/shutdown) — migrate to lifespan handler when convenient.
critical_code_review_comments: recap.js shareOrDownloadBlob correctly guards Capacitor via isNativePlatform() and falls through to Web Share/download in the browser — verified in code.
InstallPromptContext.jsx uses window.Capacitor?.isNativePlatform?.() guard; listener still attaches on browser (verified live).
index.js SW registration guarded by isNative() helper AND https protocol — good.
MOTSReveal Confetti has pointer-events: none and aria-hidden — non-blocking backdrop click preserved.
seed_data_creation: None. MOTS confetti live check skipped (requires seeding 5+ played matches in a group); component verified structurally.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Router pytest suite is stable and fast (20 tests <2s). Full backend suite 68/68 green. Capacitor is scaffolded but native runtime is not available in this container — do not attempt android build/sync. For MOTS confetti live test: clear localStorage['fairxi_mots_reveals_seen'], POST 5+ matches with status=played to a group, then load /group/:id/:token and look for [data-testid='mots-confetti'] inside [data-testid='mots-reveal'].
